message:
test(cli): add comprehensive CLI command tests

Add 22 new tests covering all CLI commands:

Serve Command (5 tests):
- Help display
- Server startup and health check
- Schema API endpoint
- Query API endpoint
- Error handling for invalid SQL

Enrich Command (4 tests):
- Help display
- Embedding generation
- Flat index creation
- Missing column error handling

Transform Command (6 tests):
- Column selection
- WHERE filtering
- LIMIT results
- Parquet to Lance conversion
- Arrow to Lance conversion
- SQL expressions

Query Command Edge Cases (7 tests):
- Aggregate functions (COUNT, SUM, AVG)
- GROUP BY
- ORDER BY
- WHERE with comparisons
- String comparisons
- MIN/MAX functions
- DISTINCT

Total: 42 tests (was 20, now 42)
